# FAINL

> FAINL is a Dutch multi-model AI consensus platform. Multiple models answer independently, challenge assumptions, debate, and return one weighted conclusion.

## Primary public pages

- [FAINL](https://www.fainl.com/): product and chat entry point
- [AI nieuws](https://www.fainl.com/nieuws): source-based Dutch AI news and analysis
- [Recent news feed](https://www.fainl.com/api/news-feed): RSS 2.0 feed with current published articles
- [AI model comparison](https://www.fainl.com/vergelijk/chatgpt-vs-gemini-vs-claude): model comparison guide
- [AI model guides](https://www.fainl.com/modellen/gpt-5-6-sol-uitleg): practical model documentation
- [Tutorials](https://www.fainl.com/tutorials/ai-modellen-kiezen-voor-bedrijf): practical AI workflows
- [Pricing](https://www.fainl.com/tokens): credits and plans
- [FAQ](https://www.fainl.com/faq): product and usage answers
- [Contact](https://www.fainl.com/contact): organization contact route

## Content policy

FAINL news articles are based on linked primary sources. They are rewritten in Dutch, add FAINL-specific analysis, disclose source links, and must pass text and image quality checks before automatic publication.
